summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Case Management Dashboard - all backend APIs and frontend features working correctly with expected data values
passed_tests: Backend API /api/cases/filters returns filter options
Backend API /api/cases/data returns correct KPI data (Total: 92,348, Open: 2,298, Closed: 90,050)
Backend API /api/cases/table returns paginated case records
Backend API filtering functionality works
Backend API download endpoint works
Frontend /cases page loads with correct KPI values
Case Type pie chart renders with data
Status Breakdown chart displays properly
Case Origin bar chart shows data
Cases by Case Owner bar chart renders
Area/Sub Area table displays data correctly
Detailed case table with pagination works
Filter dropdowns work in sidebar (10 filters)
Toggle pills in header work (7 toggles: Beyond TAT, Within TAT, Exclusion, Inclusion, Above 24 Hrs, Within 24 Hrs)
Upload Excel button is visible and functional
Download button works
Portal link navigates back to landing page
Landing page shows Case Management module as live
Table search functionality works
Pagination controls work
Sidebar toggle works
Filter reset functionality works
